qa_pairs.question: Who are the males with a House dust mite allergy coded at least 232350006, weighing exactly 55.58 kg, and having an outpatient procedure with code 371883000?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN encounters ON patients.patient = encounters.patient
JOIN allergies ON patients.patient = allergies.patient
JOIN observations ON patients.patient = observations.patient
WHERE allergies.code >= 232350006 AND encounters.description = 'Outpatient procedure' AND observations.units = 'kg' AND encounters.code = 371883000 AND allergies.description = 'House dust mite allergy' AND observations.value = 55.58 AND patients.gender = 'M'

qa_pairs.question: Which individuals born in Revere MA US with SSN 999-44-2908 have encounters described as Encounter for symptom with a code at most 185345009 and also have allergies and immunizations recorded?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT patients.patient FROM patients
JOIN encounters ON patients.patient = encounters.patient
JOIN allergies ON patients.patient = allergies.patient
JOIN immunizations ON patients.patient = immunizations.patient
WHERE patients.birthplace = 'Revere MA US' AND patients.ssn = '999-44-2908' AND encounters.description = 'Encounter for symptom' AND encounters.code <= 185345009
